title: One Heart Challenge
description: A hardcore survival modpack where you only have one heart. Every hit could be your last—survive and see how many days you can last.
body:
![image 1.1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c756b7a216ccb54da42123e9a503a89abb17558.png)

This is a hardcore survival modpack where you start with only one heart. Every mistake matters, every fight is dangerous, and every decision can mean the difference between life and death. Your goal is simple but brutal: survive for as many days as possible in a world where even the smallest threat can end your run. Plan carefully, avoid unnecessary risks, and push your limits to see how long you can last.
